description: Pre-validated instance-id rejection (both languages agree) and the DELETE the handler issues once bypass-confirmed.

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_database_mysql_instance_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)

cases.name: rejects non-positive instance_id
cases.expect_error: instance_id must be a positive integer
